name: IdsEdwMaraClnclClsFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_main AS ( SELECT MARA_CLNCL_CLS.MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_ID, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.EFF_DT_SK, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.TERM_DT_SK, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_DESC, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.CLNCL_CLS_TX, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC, MARA_CLNCL_CLS.SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC, COALESCE(CD_MPPNG.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MARA_CLNCL_CLS MARA_CLNCL_CLS LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD_MPPNG ON MARA_CLNCL_CLS.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD_MPPNG.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE MARA_CLNCL_CLS.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} AND CD_MPPNG.TRGT_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysNm}'), cte_filtered AS ( SELECT MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK, CLNCL_CLS_ID, EFF_DT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, TERM_DT_SK, AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM, AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC, CLNCL_CLS_DESC, CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID, CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC, CLNCL_CLS_TX, PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID, PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC, SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_main WHERE MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK <> 1 AND MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK <> 0), cte_na AS ( SELECT 1 AS MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK, 'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_ID, '1753-01-01' AS EFF_DT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS TERM_DT_SK, 'NA' AS AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM, 'NA' AS AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC, 'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_DESC, 'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID, 'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC, 'NA' AS CLNCL_CLS_TX, 'NA' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID, 'NA' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC, 'NA' AS SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ), cte_unk AS ( SELECT 0 AS MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK, 'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_ID, '1753-01-01' AS EFF_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS TERM_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS AHRQ_CHRNC_CAT_NM, 'UNK' AS AHRQ_MOST_CMN_CHRNC_CLS_DESC, 'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_DESC, 'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_ID, 'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_SUM_GRP_DESC, 'UNK' AS CLNCL_CLS_TX, 'UNK' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_ID, 'UNK' AS PRPSD_BODY_SYS_DESC, 'UNK' AS SEC_BODY_SYS_DESC, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK ) SELECT * FROM cte_filtered UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_na UNION ALL SELECT * FROM cte_unk

Annotations:

Job Name: IdsEdwMaraClnclClsDExtr
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
Write MBR_CARE_OPP_I Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwMbrCareOppILoad.
